sections.paragraph:
διανυκτέρευσις, εως, ἡ (s. διανυκτερεύω; τοῦ πάσχα δ. Eus., HE 6, 9, 2) night-watch διὰ [τ]ὰ̣ς [νης]τ̣ί̣α̣̣ κ̣α̣[ὶ τὰς]| δι[α]νυκτερεύσις τὰς πρὸς τοὺς ἀδελφούς through fasting and night-watches with his fellow Christians AcPl Ha 7, 25f.—DELG s.v. νύξ.

Eus. Eus. = Eusebius of Caesarea, various works; IV a.d.—List 5

AcPl Ha AcPl Ha = Acts of Paul, PHamb—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 234
